title: Projektkoordinator Großprojekte (m/w/d)
matched_skills: Project coordination (Erste Erfahrung in der Projektabwicklung)
Stakeholder coordination (Koordination zwischen Bauleitung, Monteuren und externen Partnern)
Documentation preparation (Vorbereitung von Abrechnungen und Dokumentationen)
missing_skills: SHK / Gebäudetechnik vocational training or certification (Ausbildung im Bereich SHK)
Techniker or Meister qualification in building services
Knowledge of Heizung, Sanitär, erneuerbare Energien
Führerschein Klasse B (Class B driving licence)
key_requirements: Vocational training or Techniker/Meister in SHK or Gebäudetechnik — strongly preferred
Experience in construction project execution (Projektabwicklung) or site coordination (Baukoordination)
Preparation of billing documents and project documentation
Involvement in contract amendments (Nachträge) and project controlling
MS Office; Class B driving licence
cv_highlights: 4+ years of project coordination and PMO experience across cross-functional teams
Proven track record in stakeholder coordination, documentation, and reporting
Budget tracking and project controlling background (USD 8M programme at HSBC)
Structured, process-oriented working style demonstrated at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
Strong communication skills; fluent in German — relevant for local German employer
gaps: No background whatsoever in Gebäudetechnik, SHK, construction, or building services — this is the core domain of the role
No construction site experience or knowledge of on-site workflows between Bauleitung and Monteure
No experience with Nachträge or construction-specific billing/controlling
Location: Rhauderfehn (Ostfriesland) is approximately 200 km from Lüneburg — significant commute or relocation required for an on-site role
Likely no Class B driving licence documented in CV
Role is hands-on, trades-adjacent coordination; Boru's background is in digital transformation and FinTech PMO — mismatch in industry context
recommended_emphasis: If applying: lead with general project coordination and documentation skills
Highlight German language fluency as a practical strength for local communication
Emphasise structured working style and cross-functional coordination adaptability
Acknowledge domain gap honestly; position willingness to learn Gebäudetechnik context
recommendation: NOT RECOMMENDED. The role has a hard requirement for SHK/Gebäudetechnik domain knowledge that Boru entirely lacks, making this a poor fit regardless of transferable coordination skills. The on-site location in Rhauderfehn (Ostfriesland, ~200 km from Lüneburg) adds a significant practical barrier for a fully on-site role. Match score: 22/100 — reflects partial overlap in generic project coordination skills only.
